クラス NocturnesCurtainCall

java.lang.Object
model.entity.Weapon
model.weapon.NocturnesCurtainCall
すべての実装されたインタフェース:
DamageTriggeredWeaponEffect
public class NocturnesCurtainCall extends Weapon implements DamageTriggeredWeaponEffect
Nocturne's Curtain Call (5-star Catalyst).

Base stats (Lv 90): 542 Base ATK, 88.2% CRIT DMG (substat).

Ballad of the Crossroads (R1):

  • Max HP +10% (constant, via applyPassive(StatsContainer, double)).
  • When triggering Lunar reactions or inflicting Lunar Reaction DMG on opponents, the equipping character recovers 14 Energy (at most once every 18 s, active even while off-field) and receives Bountiful Sea's Sacred Wine for 12 s: Max HP +14%, CRIT DMG from Lunar Reaction DMG +60%.

The CRIT DMG bonus is implemented via StatType.LUNAR_REACTION_CRIT_DMG, which is added to CRIT_DMG exclusively on the Lunar path in DamageCalculator.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • NocturnesCurtainCall

      public NocturnesCurtainCall()
      Constructs Nocturne's Curtain Call with Lv 90 base stats.

  • メソッドの詳細

    • applyPassive

      public void applyPassive(StatsContainer stats, double currentTime)
      Applies the constant +10% Max HP bonus from the weapon passive.
      オーバーライド:
      applyPassive クラス内 Weapon
      パラメータ:
      stats - the stats container to mutate in-place
      currentTime - simulation time in seconds

    • onDamage

      public void onDamage(Character user, AttackAction action, double currentTime, CombatSimulator sim)
      Fires the energy recovery and Bountiful Sea's Sacred Wine buff when the equipped character inflicts Lunar Reaction DMG.

      The energy recovery can trigger at most once every 18 s and fires regardless of whether the character is currently on-field or off-field. The Sacred Wine buff grants +14% Max HP and +60% CRIT DMG on Lunar Reaction DMG for 12 s.

      定義:
      onDamage インタフェース内 DamageTriggeredWeaponEffect
      パラメータ:
      user - the character who dealt the damage
      action - the attack action that triggered the damage event
      currentTime - simulation time in seconds at the damage event
      sim - the active combat simulator
